MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Ann Ingraham (Petitioner). Patrick Sullivan for Joanna Profumo (Executrix/Respondent).

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Judgment On The Pleadings On Ingraham Probate Code Section 850 Petition
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for and with Ann Ingraham. Patrick Sullivan for Joanna Profumo.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. After hearing argument, the Court stated that the tentative stands. The motion was denied.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bonner.

The matter went back on the record. The Court signed an order referring the matter to mediation at the request of the Parties, (signing the order for the same in open court). Mediation is to be completed by November 5, 2008. Status on mediation is set for November 12, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept 204. The Petition For Specific Performance Of Contract To Convey Real Property was continued from September 23, 2008 to November 12, 2008.

Notice Of Morion And Motion To Disqualify P. Sullivan As Litigation Counsel; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Supprot Of Motion.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for and with Ann Ingraham. Patrick Sullivan for Joanna Perfumo.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

Petition For Specific Performance Of Contract To Convey Real Property After Decedent'S Death
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Continued To Sep-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Partial Distribution On Waiver Of Account; Request For Partial Alalowance Of Statutory Compensation For Executrix And Her Attorney
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Sullivan for Joanna Profumo.

Mr. Sullivan stated that he spoke to the Examiner, that there was an error on the petition, that the amount of the reserve should be $100,000.00 and that this amount should be sufficient to cover the litigation fees. In addition, he stated that he was requesting 63% of the statutory fees and that he was working on the Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aguino.

Petition For Specific Performance Of Contract To Convey Real Property After Decedent'S Death
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Continued To Jul-23-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Sullivan for Joanna Perfumo. Daniel Conrad for and with Ann Ingraham.

The Court was advised that the Discovery department signed a protective order postponing the deposition of Ms. Ingraham until the motion to disqualify Patrick Sullivan as litigation counsel is heard. The parties presented argument to support there positions. The Court did not rule on the motion to disqualify Mr. Sullivan and set the matter to be heard on July 23, 2008 at 10:30 a.m. Further status was also set for that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Anderson.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order;
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel A. Conrad, Esq., appeared for petitioner and moving party: Ann Ingraham
No other appearance.

RULING:
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner The Estate Of Anthony Ronconi's Motion For Protective Order is granted as it seeks an order postponing the deposition of Ann Ingraham until after the hearing on the motion to disqualify Patrick Sullivan as litigation counsel. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Morion And Motion To Disqualify P. Sullivan As Litigation Counsel; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Supprot Of Motion.
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Continued To Jul-23-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for and with Ann Ingraham (Moving Party). Patrick Sullivan for the Respondent.

The Court stated that the tentative ruling was to deny the motion. Mr. Conrad stated that the previous hearing was before Judge Dearman and refused to stipulate to Commissioner Kaplan hearing the matter. The matter is to be reset before Judge Dearman.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition For Approval Of Extraordinary Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: patrick Sullivan for Joanna Profumo. Daniel Conrad for Ann Ingraham.

Mr. Sullivan stated that he submitted a demurrer and that if he prevailed, suggested setting the matter for trial. Mr. Conrad stated that Mr. Sullivan filed an objection, not a demurrer and that the Court should allow the parties time to conduct discovery. The Court suggested mediation. Mr. Conrad stated that his client would agree to mediation after the first round of discovery. Mr. Sullivan stated that he would recommend mediation to his client. Mr. Conrad wants the right to take depositions before mediation. The Petition For Approval of Attorney's Fees was denied without prejudice. The Petition For Specific Performance Of Contract was continued to June 17, 2008 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
